title: limnocitrus littoralis
intro: Limnocitrus littoralis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the swamp citrus or swamp orange. The plant is native to the coastal regions of Queensland, Australia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Limnocitrus littoralis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Limnocitrus littoralis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
